executiveSummary: All 9 functional requirements and 9 user stories for iteration 000028 are fully implemented and verified. The codebase delivers three new node wrappers (image_scale_by, dw_preprocessor, load_audio), four complete pipeline modules (ltx2/canny, ltx2/depth, ltx2/pose, ltx23/ia2v), four corresponding example scripts, and CPU-only test coverage. The full test suite (1339 tests) passes with zero failures. All modules follow the established lazy-import pattern, export contracts, and architecture conventions.

verificationByFR.notes: image_scale_by(image, upscale_method, scale_by) defined in comfy_diffusion/image.py (lines 371-382). Floor-rounded dimensions, lazy comfy.utils import via _get_comfy_utils(), added to __all__ at line 435.

dw_preprocessor(image, detect_hand, detect_body, detect_face, resolution) defined in comfy_diffusion/image.py (lines 384-418). Lazy import via _get_dw_preprocessor_deps(), added to __all__ at line 436. Raises ImportError with clear message when controlnet_aux is not installed.

load_audio(path, start_time, duration) defined in comfy_diffusion/audio.py (lines 229-266). Uses torchaudio.load(), trims by start_time/duration, returns {"waveform": Tensor[1,C,N], "sample_rate": int}. Added to __all__ at line 276.
All four pipeline files (canny.py, depth.py, pose.py, ia2v.py) export exactly __all__ = ["manifest", "run"]. No other public symbols.

manifest() in each pipeline lists only models from active (non-bypassed) workflow nodes. Canny: 5 entries; depth: 7 entries (incl. Lotus model + SD VAE); pose: 5 entries; ia2v: 5 entries. Bypassed nodes correctly omitted.

run() node execution order mirrors workflow. Canny: euler_ancestral + ManualSigmas for both passes. Depth: euler + ltxv_scheduler for Lotus pass, gradient_estimation for LTX pass. Pose: dw_preprocessor -> euler + ltxv_scheduler -> gradient_estimation. ia2v: euler_ancestral_cfg_pp (pass 1, seed variable), euler_cfg_pp (pass 2, fixed seed 42) — all matching reference workflows.

All four example scripts are self-contained: import comfy_diffusion at top, all heavy imports (torch, torchaudio, av, comfy.*) deferred inside main(). Each calls download_models(manifest(), ...) then run(...) with parsed CLI args.
comfy_diffusion/pipelines/video/ltx/ltx23/__init__.py line 31: __all__ = ["t2v", "i2v", "flf2v", "ia2v"]. No 'Not yet implemented' comment present.
image_scale_by and dw_preprocessor added to image.__all__ (lines 435-436). load_audio added to audio.__all__ (line 276). ia2v added to ltx23.__all__ (line 31).

verificationByUS.notes: image_scale_by callable with correct signature, returns IMAGE tensor, dimensions are floor(h*scale_by) x floor(w*scale_by), in __all__, lazy-import pattern verified.
dw_preprocessor callable with correct signature, returns IMAGE tensor with same batch dimension as input, in __all__, lazy-import pattern verified.
load_audio callable with path, start_time=0.0, duration=None. Uses torchaudio. Returns dict with waveform [1,C,N] and sample_rate int. In __all__.

comfy_diffusion/pipelines/video/ltx/ltx2/canny.py present. manifest() returns 5 ModelEntry objects. run() accepts all required kwargs. Sampler euler_ancestral, ManualSigmas, CFG 3.0/1.0 per workflow spec.

comfy_diffusion/pipelines/video/ltx/ltx2/depth.py present. manifest() returns 7 entries. run() accepts all required kwargs. Lotus pass: euler + ltxv_scheduler; LTX pass: gradient_estimation + ManualSigmas.

comfy_diffusion/pipelines/video/ltx/ltx2/pose.py present. manifest() returns 5 entries. run() accepts prompt, negative_prompt, video_path, first_frame_path (optional), seed, width, height, length, fps, cfg values, lora strengths. DWPreprocessor integrated.

comfy_diffusion/pipelines/video/ltx/ltx23/ia2v.py present. manifest() returns 5 entries. run() accepts prompt, negative_prompt, image_path/image, audio_path, seed, width, height, length, fps, cfg, audio_start_time, audio_duration, guide strengths, lora strengths. Samplers euler_ancestral_cfg_pp (pass 1) and euler_cfg_pp (pass 2, fixed seed 42). ltx23/__init__.py exports ia2v with no 'Not yet implemented' placeholder.

All four example scripts present at expected paths. Each accepts --models-dir, --prompt, and pipeline-specific flags (--video, --first-frame, --image, --audio, --audio-start-time, --audio-duration). Heavy imports inside main(). Error messages printed for missing required args. download_models + run pattern followed.

tests/test_image.py covers image_scale_by and dw_preprocessor. tests/test_audio.py covers load_audio (including __all__ membership). tests/test_pipelines_ltx2_canny.py, test_pipelines_ltx2_depth.py, test_pipelines_ltx2_pose.py cover manifest() and lazy-import checks for ltx2 pipelines. tests/test_pipelines_ltx23_ia2v.py covers ia2v manifest() and samplers. tests/test_us028_example_scripts.py validates all four example scripts for existence, syntax, and no forbidden top-level imports. uv run pytest: 1339 passed, 0 failures.

minorObservations: tests/test_pipelines_ltx2_pose.py emits two DeprecationWarning instances about 'Attribute s is deprecated' (AST node.value.elts access) — harmless in Python 3.13 but will break in Python 3.14. Should be updated to use .value instead of .s.

dw_preprocessor depends on controlnet_aux which is not listed as a core dependency. The ImportError message is clear, but it could be surfaced in extras/optional deps documentation or pyproject.toml as a separate optional extra (e.g., [pose]) to match the pattern used for CUDA/CPU extras.

depth.py manifest() returns 7 entries including an SD VAE for the Lotus depth pass. If the Lotus model is removed from a future iteration, the SD VAE entry becomes orphaned — consider grouping Lotus-specific entries together for easier maintenance.

ia2v.py uses a fixed seed of 42 for pass 2 (matching the reference workflow). This is correct per spec but is a magic constant — a brief inline comment referencing the workflow spec would aid future maintainers.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: Iteration 000028 is fully compliant with the PRD. All 9 FRs and 9 USs satisfy their acceptance criteria. The 1339-test suite passes cleanly on CPU. Recommended follow-up (non-blocking): (1) Fix the Python 3.14 deprecation warning in test_pipelines_ltx2_pose.py by replacing .s with .value on AST string constants. (2) Add an inline comment in ia2v.py next to the fixed seed 42 referencing the source workflow. (3) Consider documenting controlnet_aux as an optional [pose] extra in pyproject.toml. The iteration is ready to merge.
